import axios from'axios';import logger from'../utils/logger';const API_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'/api';const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Attach JWT token + log every request

api.interceptors.response.use(res=>{logger.info("API Response: ".concat(res.status," ").concat(res.config.url));return res;},err=>{var _err$response,_err$config,_err$response2;const status=(_err$response=err.response)===null||_err$response===void 0?void 0:_err$response.status;const url=(_err$config=err.config)===null||_err$config===void 0?void 0:_err$config.url;logger.error("API Error: ".concat(status," ").concat(url),(_err$response2=err.response)===null||_err$response2===void 0?void 0:_err$response2.data);if(status===401){logger.warn('Unauthorized - clearing session and redirecting to login');localStorage.removeItem('token');localStorage.removeItem('user');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(err);});// ─── AUTH ────────────────────────────────────────────
export const authAPI={register:data=>api.post('/auth/register',data),login:data=>api.post('/auth/login',data)};// ─── LISTINGS ────────────────────────────────────────

export const bookingsAPI={create:data=>api.post('/bookings',data),getMine:()=>api.get('/bookings/mine'),updateStatus:(id,data)=>api.put("/bookings/".concat(id),data),getForListing:listingId=>api.get("/bookings/listing/".concat(listingId))};// ─── REVIEWS ─────────────────────────────────────────
